name: bin_batched_outer_product_noncompact_j16_k16_o64_t64
intent: Binary batched outer-product diagnostic for the non-compact strided-kernel path: C[j,k,o,t] = A[k,j,t] * B[o,t], so lhs free axes require a metadata permutation.
notes: The lhs free group is intentionally non-compact after metadata alignment; this fixes coverage for the strided fallback rather than the compact fast path.
